keyconfigmanager.title: 🔐 Key Configuration Management
keyconfigmanager.plaintext_encoding_desc: The encoding format of plaintext before encryption, such as UTF-8, Base64, etc.
keyconfigmanager.ciphertext_encoding_desc: The encoding format of ciphertext for storage or transmission, such as Base64, Hex, etc.
keyconfigmanager.key_iv_encoding_desc: The encoding format of key and initialization vector, usually UTF-8
keyconfigmanager.support_compound_encoding: Supports compound encoding, multiple encoding methods can be selected and applied in sequence
keyconfigmanager.no_configs: No configurations available, please create a new configuration
keyconfigmanager.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete configuration
